nasb.text: The Amorites who lived in that hill country came out against you and chased you as bees do, and crushed you from Seir to Hormah.

esv.text: Then the Amorites who lived in that hill country came out against you and chased you as bees do and beat you down in Seir as far as Hormah.

cnv.text: 住在那山上的亞摩利人，就出來攻擊你們，好像蜂群一樣追趕你們，在西珥擊殺你們，直到何珥瑪。

ccb.text: 住在山区的亚摩利人蜂拥出击，打败了你们，从西珥追杀你们，一直追到何珥玛。
